title: ドラゴンボール レジェンズ
subTitle: Action/Fighting
desc:
The highly anticipated Dragon Ball anime is finally here!
High-quality 3D graphics and full voice acting during battles make it a truly unique experience!
Enjoy action battles with rivals from all over the world!
One-Finger Card Action Battle
・Easy battles with one-finger controls!
・Unleash combos and special moves with a single tap.
Global Battle
・Battle against users from all over the world in real time!
・Use your custom-trained characters to overwhelm other players with stunning action.
Original Story
・The game's protagonist is an original character drawn by Akira Toriyama!
・Experience Goku and his friends' new adventures.
・Fans of the Dragon Ball universe
・Want to experience the world of Dragon Ball through an action or battle game?
・Want to experience the exhilaration of an action game?
・Frequent players of Jump series games
・Dragon Ball game fans
・Want to enjoy exciting action battles with simple controls?
[System Requirements and Other Inquiries]
https://bnfaq.channel.or.jp/contact/faq_list/1925
*Please be sure to use this app within the operating environment specified in the link above. Please note that even if you are using the operating environment, the app may not function properly due to your usage environment or device-specific factors.

[About the Legends Pass]
The Legends Pass is a monthly subscription that offers boost effects for ¥480 per month.
■ Payment, Term, and Renewal Information
- The Legends Pass is valid for one month after purchase and will automatically renew.
- The validity period will automatically renew unless you cancel the service at least 24 hours before the end of the validity period.
- Please note that deleting the app will not cancel this product.
■ Cancellation Information
- You can cancel your subscription by following the steps below.
1. Launch the Google Play Store
2. Tap the menu icon in the upper left > "Subscriptions"
3. Tap the subscription you want to cancel from the list
4. Tap "Cancel Subscription" and follow the on-screen instructions.
- Please note that deleting the app will not cancel this service.
- You can continue to use this service for the duration of your validity period, even after cancellation.
■ Other Notes
- Please do not interrupt the app while the purchase (communication) for this product is in progress, as this may cause problems with the process of using this product.
